title: Match Match Mania!
description:
Welcome to the future of competitive sports!

• Puzzle fans rejoice!

Make matches by destroying or swapping gems. Can you make a Mega Match (9)!?

• Defend your towers from the enemy's ranks.

Whether it's KBaM or a controller, your shooting skills will be put to the test.

• RTS-inspired economy system.

Hire peons to mine for bolts. Use bolts to purchase items of increasing power!

• Research, buy items, and adapt to game-changing events - all in real time.

Each match3+ sends a minion down a chosen lane: Top, Bottom, Mid, and Jungle.
Keep an eye on your opponent and adapt accordingly!

• Gem Frenzy Mode.

The fastest matcher wins! In Gem Frenzy, don't worry about towers, minions, items, or sniping. Focus on making matches and race to victory!

• Background on me and the game.
Match Match Mania! was inspired by games in the late 90s and early 2000s - Weird ideas mashed together and just going for it. Inspirations include Yoshi's Cookie, Power Stone, Chu Chu Rocket, and much, much more.
The game was developed with split-screen, human vs human competitive play in mind. If you don't have anyone at home, try Steam Remote Play to invite a friend!
description_short: Compete head to head in this exciting FPS Match-3 MOBA!
